description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a prominent hip roof and a symmetrical facade. The exterior walls are finished in a light gray material, likely stucco or concrete, with dark trim around the windows and doors. The front features a covered porch supported by two robust columns, stone bases, and a shingled overhang above the entryway. Windows are arranged in neat, symmetrical rows on both floors, with brown framing that contrasts with the lighter wall surfaces. The rear of the house includes a small fenced area with potted plants, and the side elevations show additional windows and a secondary entry. The overall design is simple yet solid, with Craftsman influences visible in the porch and window detailing.
description: A two-story house with a hip roof, symmetrical window rows, and a covered front porch supported by columns. The exterior is light gray with dark trim and Craftsman-style details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry with a covered porch, two columns, and symmetrical upper and lower windows.
description_view_1: Side view displaying three upper windows, two lower windows, and the extension of the porch roof on the left.
description_view_2: Rear view with a single upper window, a door, a small fenced area, and potted plants.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with three upper windows, one lower window, and a partial view of the porch structure.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with two columns, stone bases, steps, and a shingled overhang above a central wooden door
